name: Saori Hasegawa
description:
No one really belongs...

A mature student attending Gekkoukan High, Saori is two years older than the average student. She's a kind person, but has severe problems interacting with others, which leads to her becoming a victim of bullying and false rumors by other students.

Set in 2009 in Iwatodai, I added some of the areas of the game such as the school and Paulownia Mall amongst other things.

She's my favourite Persona social link, and one of my favourite Persona characters in the whole series. You should give it a chance if you haven't, it's really good.

As always, feedback is appreciated :)
creator: likeajudgeeyes
